summary: Review of changes addressing external review #1 feedback from berendt. All 6 WARNING findings (W-001 through W-006) and 2 INFO findings (I-001, I-002) are correctly addressed: fail-fast: false added to all matrix strategies, SERVICE_REF null guard added, tool versions pinned via env vars, setup-envtest K8s version pinned, internal/common added to test and integration matrices with dedicated Makefile targets, and latest tag restricted to default branch. The test matrix refactoring from [keystone, c5c3] to [common, keystone, c5c3] with test-common/test-operator/test-integration-common targets is clean and resolves the duplicate common coverage issue. However, docs/reference/ci-workflow.md was not updated to reflect the new matrix structure, pinned tool versions, and coverage upload changes, and .codecov.yml is missing flag definitions for the new unit-common and integration-common flags.

tests_checklist.item: New Makefile targets (test-common, test-operator, test-integration-common) produce correct coverage filenames
CI matrix conditional logic correctly routes common vs operator targets
Codecov upload filenames match Makefile target outputs for all matrix entries

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing Makefile target patterns (OPERATOR variable, .PHONY, comments)
CI workflow YAML is valid and well-structured
Review pattern files are well-written with actionable detection hints

security_checklist.item: GITHUB_TOKEN used correctly for GHCR auth
SERVICE_REF null guard prevents confusing downstream failures
Latest tag restricted to default branch prevents cross-branch clobbering

architecture_checklist.item: Matrix refactoring cleanly separates common from operator-specific tests
Pinned tool versions defined in single-source-of-truth env block
fail-fast: false applied consistently to all matrix strategies

dry_yagni_checklist.item: test-common and test-operator are minimal wrappers around go test

fail_fast_checklist.item: Makefile targets validate OPERATOR parameter before use

defensive_checklist.item: SERVICE_REF null/empty guard with descriptive ::error:: message
test-operator requires OPERATOR with clear error message

issues_found.description: Test job documentation describes old matrix structure. Section shows `operator: [keystone, c5c3]` with `make test OPERATOR=<matrix.operator>` and `cover-unit-common.out,cover-unit-${{ matrix.operator }}.out` coverage upload, but the implementation now uses `target: [common, keystone, c5c3]` with `test-common`/`test-operator` branching and single-file coverage upload (`cover-unit-${{ matrix.target }}.out`).
issues_found.fix: Update lines 123-158 to describe the new [common, keystone, c5c3] matrix with the if/else conditional running test-common or test-operator, and the single-file coverage upload pattern.

issues_found.description: Test-integration job documentation describes old matrix structure and unpinned tool version. Section shows `operator: [keystone, c5c3]` and `go install setup-envtest@latest`, but the implementation now uses `target: [common, keystone, c5c3]` with `test-integration-common` branching and pinned `setup-envtest@${{ env.SETUP_ENVTEST_VERSION }}`.
issues_found.fix: Update to describe the new [common, keystone, c5c3] matrix with test-integration-common for the common leg, and reference the pinned SETUP_ENVTEST_VERSION.

issues_found.description: Environment Variables section only documents REGISTRY and IMAGE_PREFIX, but the implementation now also includes CONTROLLER_GEN_VERSION (v0.17.3) and SETUP_ENVTEST_VERSION (v0.20.4) in the top-level env block.
issues_found.fix: Add CONTROLLER_GEN_VERSION and SETUP_ENVTEST_VERSION to the Environment Variables table with their purpose (pinned tool versions for CI reproducibility).

issues_found.description: Verify-codegen section documents `go install controller-gen@latest` but the implementation now uses `go install controller-gen@${{ env.CONTROLLER_GEN_VERSION }}`.
issues_found.fix: Update to reference the pinned CONTROLLER_GEN_VERSION env var.

issues_found.description: Image tagging table shows `latest` applied on both main push and v* tag push, but the implementation now restricts latest to the default branch only (`enable={{is_default_branch}}`). On v* tags from non-main branches, latest is NOT applied.
issues_found.fix: Update the tagging table: main push gets `sha-<full-sha>, latest`; v* tag push gets `sha-<full-sha>, <version>` (no latest unless on default branch).

issues_found.description: flag_management.individual_flags defines unit-keystone, unit-c5c3, integration-keystone, integration-c5c3 but is missing unit-common and integration-common. CI now uploads coverage under these flags (from the common matrix leg), but without flag definitions, the uploads lack path scoping. While default_rules.carryforward covers basic carryforward, the missing path configuration means common coverage data won't be properly scoped to internal/common/ paths.
issues_found.fix: Add two flag entries: unit-common (paths: [internal/common/], carryforward: true) and integration-common (paths: [internal/common/], carryforward: true).

next_steps: Update docs/reference/ci-workflow.md to reflect the new [common, keystone, c5c3] matrix structure, pinned tool versions, and revised image tagging behavior
Add unit-common and integration-common flag definitions to .codecov.yml flag_management.individual_flags
